description: Resolve missing behavior: BehaviorRegistry.resolve() returns null and executeGuarded returns ok:false for unregistered actions.

cases.name: resolve-missing-behavior
cases.description: BehaviorRegistry.resolve() returns null for an action with no registered behavior

cases.name: execute-missing-behavior
cases.description: BehaviorRegistry.executeGuarded() returns ok:false with issue behavior-not-found when no behavior is registered
